steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Subtract the second equation from the first: $$(2a+8b)-(2a+4b)=198-98,$$ giving $4b=100$.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $25$. Subtracting the second equation from the first equation in the given system of equations yields $\left(2a-2a\right)+\left(8b-4b\right)=198-98$, which is equivalent to$0+4b=100$, or $4b=100$. Dividing each side of this equation by $4$ yields $b=25$.
